screen.sdm_mod.technical_book.left_page: Euler's formula links exponential and trigonometric functions.
screen.sdm_mod.technical_book.right_page: Substituting x = π simplifies the expression to e^(iπ) = -1.
screen.sdm_mod.technical_book.footnote: It is widely known as a beautiful identity.
